positive: A whimsical, stylized fox sitting calmly among abstract, geometric mountain peaks and blooming crystal flowers. The composition should be centered, featuring the fox in a confident, relaxed pose against a vibrant gradient background of deep sapphire blue transitioning to emerald green. Use a clean silhouette style with thick outlines and flat color fields (stained glass aesthetic). Strong contrast is key, making the fox and flowers pop against the background. Lighting should be bright, even, and non-directional, maximizing color saturation and visual pop. Suitable for screen printing on natural fabric.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, noise, ugly, artifacts, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, messy, graffiti, photorealism, grayscale, logo, brand, copyright, complex background
